tools.name: boj_rokur_authorize_start
tools.description: Request pre-start authorization for a container. Rokur validates that all required secrets are present. Returns allow/deny verdict — never secret values. Gate must be in idle state.

tools.name: boj_rokur_status
tools.description: Query the secrets presence status. Returns required/missing counts — never secret names or values. Available in any gate state.

tools.name: boj_rokur_reload
tools.description: Hot-reload required secrets from the environment without restarting the Rokur sidecar. Use after deploying new secrets.

tools.name: boj_rokur_health
tools.description: Liveness check on the Rokur sidecar service. Returns health status and non-sensitive configuration.
